title: How Kenyan Creators Get Paid Internationally from First Principles: The Definitive Breakdown: What You Need to Know
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling digital products from Nigeria, Ghana, Kenya, Pakistan, or Bangladesh is possible with crypto-native infrastructure that has no geographic restrictions.

content.text: Kenyan creators face the daunting challenge of selling digital products internationally due to restrictive payment platforms and geographic limitations. Many seek answers on how to accept payments without a PayPal account or how to overcome bank restrictions. But the truth is, the solution lies in embracing blockchain-based payments and a comprehensive store infrastructure. In this definitive breakdown, we'll reveal the underlying principles and components required to successfully sell digital products internationally from Kenya. We'll explore the technical layer, examine edge cases, and provide a complete implementation roadmap, empowering creators to unlock their full potential and get paid for their work.
The Full Picture Most Guides Leave Out

The conventional payment solutions often touted as the answer to international digital sales come with significant drawbacks, including lengthy verification processes, minimum balance requirements, and geographic restrictions. Furthermore, these platforms often charge exorbitant transaction fees, further eroding the creator's profit margins. What's more, these solutions often require a PayPal account, which is inaccessible to many creatives in Kenya and elsewhere. To truly succeed, creators need a payment solution that is decentralized, secure, and accessible to all, without the need for a traditional bank account.

At its core, the technical layer of international digital sales involves the integration of blockchain-based payments with a robust store infrastructure. With Wallet Connect, customers can make payments using their preferred cryptocurrencies, and the Core Engine ensures seamless delivery and payment verification.
Kenyan creators can now sell digital products internationally without the need for a PayPal account or bank restrictions.

As with any complex system, edge cases and failures can arise. However, with the Full Stack Bundle, creators can anticipate and mitigate these challenges. Additionally, the Core Engine automates delivery and payment verification, ensuring that customers receive their products even in the event of a payment failure. By understanding the technical layer and having a comprehensive store infrastructure in place, creators can minimize the risk of edge cases and ensure a smooth customer experience.

Implementing a successful international digital sales strategy requires a phased approach. First, creators must set up a store infrastructure using the Full Stack Bundle, including the Core Engine, Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. Next, they must configure the payment processor, integrate wallet connections, and automate delivery and payment verification.
